concept.description: Annotates View-layer types by reusable topology tier.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewReuseType, type.reuseTier = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[3] = 'primitives' THEN 'PRIMITIVE' WHEN size(segments) >= 3 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' THEN 'REUSABLE' WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] THEN 'FEATURE' ELSE 'OTHER' END, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END RETURN type AS ViewReuseType

constraint.description: Reusable View code must not depend back upward into feature-specific or less reusable tiers.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewReuseType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewReuseType) WHERE ( source.reuseTier = 'REUSABLE' AND target.reuseTier = 'FEATURE' ) OR ( source.reuseTier = 'PRIMITIVE' AND target.reuseTier IN ['FEATURE', 'REUSABLE'] ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, target.relativePath AS Target, 'FEATURE -> REUSABLE -> PRIMITIVE only' AS ExpectedDirection, source.reuseTier + ' -> ' + target.reuseTier AS ActualDirection, 'View-layer reuse dependencies must point from feature-specific roots toward reusable slotcontent and then primitives.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
